nasb.text: And He said to them, “Truly I say to you, there is no one who has left house or wife or brothers or parents or children, for the sake of the kingdom of God,

esv.text: And he said to them, “Truly, I say to you, there is no one who has left house or wife or brothers  or parents or children, for the sake of the kingdom of God,

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“我實在告訴你們，人為　神的國撇下房屋、妻子、弟兄、父母或兒女，

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我实在告诉你们，任何人为了上帝的国而撇下房屋、妻子、弟兄、父母或儿女，

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“我确实地告诉你们：没有谁为神国的缘故舍弃房屋，或妻子，或兄弟，或父母，或儿女，
